test(e2e): add bead dependency DAG view test [ddx-c5f9c009]

Adds a beads.spec.ts test that mocks a bead with a parent and two
dependencies, navigates to its detail panel, and asserts the parent
ID, Dependencies block, and each depends-on edge label are visible.
EOF

data.text: Committed. Test passes. Bead complete: added `bead detail renders dependency DAG: parent and child/depends-on relationships are visible` in `cli/internal/server/frontend/e2e/beads.spec.ts:812` which renders a mocked bead with parent + dependencies and asserts both the Parent ID and each dependency edge are visible in the detail panel.
